speed_comparison_notes: vLLM smoke was slower than the reconstructed transformers_local generation-only baseline because requests were sent sequentially over HTTP and the first requests include vLLM warmup/graph overhead.
The local comparison fields in reports/stage2_teacher_dryrun_report.json are reconstructed from existing raw per-prompt elapsed_seconds and exclude model load time.

The successful transformers_local shell run took about 354.5 seconds end-to-end including 4-bit model load; the vLLM 20-prompt client run took 193.118 seconds after the server was ready. vLLM should be benchmarked with batched/concurrent requests before deciding full teacher-call strategy.
vllm_faster_total_wall_time_or_reason: not faster against generation-only baseline; likely sequential HTTP plus warmup overhead. Faster than the observed local end-to-end load+generate run when the vLLM server is already warm.
